title: Cybersecurity: Attack and Defense Strategies
author: Yuri Diogenes, Dr. Erdal Ozkaya
description: Updated edition of the bestselling guide for planning attack and defense strategies based on the current threat landscape Key FeaturesUpdated for ransomware prevention, security posture management in multi-cloud, Microsoft Defender for Cloud, MITRE ATT&CK Framework, and moreExplore the latest tools for ethical hacking, pentesting, and Red/Blue teamingIncludes recent real-world examples to illustrate the best practices to improve security postureBook Description Cybersecurity – Attack and Defense
